properties.name: --esp-scheme
properties.description: The active color scheme — "light" or "dark".

properties.name: --esp-seed-color
properties.description: The OKLCH seed color string that drives the entire palette.

properties.name: --esp-color-primary
properties.description: The seed color, gamut-mapped to sRGB.

properties.name: --esp-color-analogous-left
properties.description: Analogous variant (seed hue minus the analogous angle).

properties.name: --esp-color-analogous-right
properties.description: Analogous variant (seed hue plus the analogous angle).

properties.name: --esp-color-complementary
properties.description: Complementary variant (seed hue plus 180°).

properties.name: --esp-color-split-complementary-left
properties.description: Split-complementary variant (complement minus offset).

properties.name: --esp-color-split-complementary-right
properties.description: Split-complementary variant (complement plus offset).

properties.name: --esp-color-triadic-left
properties.description: Triadic variant (seed hue plus 120°).

properties.name: --esp-color-triadic-right
properties.description: Triadic variant (seed hue plus 240°).

properties.name: --esp-color-danger
properties.description: Fixed semantic hue for errors and destructive actions (red-orange, hue 27).

properties.name: --esp-color-success
properties.description: Fixed semantic hue for success states (green, hue 150).

properties.name: --esp-color-warning
properties.description: Fixed semantic hue for warnings (yellow-green, hue 90).

properties.name: --esp-color-background
properties.description: Main page background surface.

properties.name: --esp-color-layer-1
properties.description: First raised layer (slightly elevated surfaces).

properties.name: --esp-color-layer-2
properties.description: Second raised layer (form fields, input backgrounds).

properties.name: --esp-color-layer-3
properties.description: Third raised layer (cards, raised buttons).

properties.name: --esp-color-layer-4
properties.description: Fourth raised layer (hover states, elevated controls).

properties.name: --esp-color-text
properties.description: Standard body text. APCA Lc ≥ 75 against background.

properties.name: --esp-color-headings
properties.description: Heading text (muted contrast). APCA Lc ≥ 60 against background.

properties.name: --esp-color-headings-hover
properties.description: Heading text with emphasis. APCA Lc ≥ 60 against background.

properties.name: --esp-color-danger-text
properties.description: Error and danger message text. APCA Lc ≥ 75 against background.

properties.name: --esp-color-link
properties.description: Link text in normal state (accent color). APCA Lc ≥ 75 against background.

properties.name: --esp-color-link-hover
properties.description: Link text on hover (high contrast). APCA Lc ≥ 75 against background.

properties.name: --esp-color-link-hover-bg
properties.description: Link hover background highlight.

properties.name: --esp-color-action-background
properties.description: Action button background (typically layer-3).

properties.name: --esp-color-action-text
properties.description: Action button text (high-contrast ink). APCA Lc ≥ 75 against action background.

properties.name: --esp-color-input-caret
properties.description: Text cursor / caret color. APCA Lc ≥ 60 against layer-2.

properties.name: --esp-color-input-selection
properties.description: Selected text color. APCA Lc ≥ 60 against selection background.

properties.name: --esp-color-input-selection-bg
properties.description: Selected text background color.

properties.name: --esp-color-border
properties.description: Border lines and dividers.

properties.name: --esp-color-shadow
properties.description: Drop shadow color.

properties.name: --esp-l-surface
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for the main background surface.

properties.name: --esp-l-raised-1
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for the first elevation level.

properties.name: --esp-l-raised-2
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for the second elevation level.

properties.name: --esp-l-raised-3
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for the third elevation level.

properties.name: --esp-l-raised-4
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for the fourth elevation level.

properties.name: --esp-l-accent
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for accent and link colors.

properties.name: --esp-l-muted
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for muted / heading text.

properties.name: --esp-l-text
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for body text.

properties.name: --esp-l-border
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for border lines.

properties.name: --esp-l-ink
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for high-contrast ink (action text).

properties.name: --esp-l-shadow
properties.description: Lightness (percentage) for shadows.

properties.name: --esp-type-tiny
properties.description: Type scale: smallest text size (captions, subscripts). Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-type-small
properties.description: Type scale: small text size. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-type-normal
properties.description: Type scale: body text size (base step, 1.125rem at 16px root). Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-type-medium
properties.description: Type scale: medium text size. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-type-big
properties.description: Type scale: large text size. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-type-large
properties.description: Type scale: extra-large text size. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-type-huge
properties.description: Type scale: largest text size (hero headings). Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-tiny
properties.description: Spacing scale: smallest spacing unit. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-small
properties.description: Spacing scale: small spacing. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-normal
properties.description: Spacing scale: standard spacing unit. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-medium
properties.description: Spacing scale: medium spacing. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-big
properties.description: Spacing scale: large spacing. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-large
properties.description: Spacing scale: extra-large spacing. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-huge
properties.description: Spacing scale: largest spacing unit. Fluid clamp() value.

properties.name: --esp-size-tiny-to-small
properties.description: Cross-step fluid size: tiny (min) to small (max).

properties.name: --esp-size-small-to-normal
properties.description: Cross-step fluid size: small (min) to normal (max).

properties.name: --esp-size-normal-to-medium
properties.description: Cross-step fluid size: normal (min) to medium (max).

properties.name: --esp-size-medium-to-big
properties.description: Cross-step fluid size: medium (min) to big (max).

properties.name: --esp-size-big-to-large
properties.description: Cross-step fluid size: big (min) to large (max).

properties.name: --esp-size-large-to-huge
properties.description: Cross-step fluid size: large (min) to huge (max).

properties.name: --esp-size-font
properties.description: Alias for --esp-type-normal. Standard font size.

properties.name: --esp-size-padding
properties.description: Alias for --esp-size-tiny-to-small. Default component internal padding.

properties.name: --esp-size-padding-page
properties.description: Alias for --esp-size-small-to-normal. Page-level section padding.

properties.name: --esp-size-border-radius
properties.description: Global border radius. Static rem value.

properties.name: --esp-font-body
properties.description: Font family for body and UI text.

properties.name: --esp-font-headings
properties.description: Font family for headings.

properties.name: --esp-font-monospace
properties.description: Font family for code and monospace text.

properties.name: --esp-page-background-image
properties.description: CSS background-image value for the page surface. Defaults to none.

properties.name: --esp-page-background-image-opacity
properties.description: Opacity of the page background image (0–1). Defaults to 1.

properties.name: --esp-box-background-image
properties.description: CSS background-image value for esp-box surfaces.

properties.name: --esp-box-background-image-opacity
properties.description: Opacity of the box background image (0–1).

properties.name: --esp-avatar-border-radius
properties.description: [esp-avatar] Border radius of the image and initials fallback.

properties.name: --esp-avatar-size
properties.description: [esp-avatar] Width and height of the avatar.

properties.name: --esp-color-box-background
properties.description: [esp-box] Background color of the box.

properties.name: --esp-box-background
properties.description: [esp-box] Background layer for images or gradients.

properties.name: --esp-box-background-opacity
properties.description: [esp-box] Opacity of the background layer.

properties.name: --esp-size-box-padding
properties.description: [esp-box] Padding inside the box.

properties.name: --esp-button-padding
properties.description: [esp-button] Padding inside the button label and icon areas.

properties.name: --esp-button-incognito-padding
properties.description: [esp-button] Padding for the incognito (borderless) button style.

properties.name: --esp-page-background
properties.description: [esp-page] Background color of the page. Defaults to var(--esp-color-background).

properties.name: --esp-page-max-width
properties.description: [esp-page] Maximum width of the main content area. Set automatically by the kind attribute: 1536px (wide), 768px (narrow), or none (full).

properties.name: --esp-header-height
properties.description: [esp-header] Height of the header bar. Defaults to calc(4.5 * var(--esp-size-small)). Consumed by esp-page, esp-header-button, and esp-burger via use-site fallbacks.

properties.name: --esp-header-background
properties.description: [esp-header] Background color of the header bar. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-2).

properties.name: --esp-header-border-width
properties.description: [esp-header] Border width of the header. Defaults to 0 0 1px 0.

properties.name: --esp-header-border
properties.description: [esp-header] Border style of the header. Defaults to solid var(--esp-color-border).

properties.name: --esp-header-shadow
properties.description: [esp-header] Box shadow of the header. Defaults to 0 0 2px var(--esp-color-shadow).

properties.name: --esp-header-brand-placement
properties.description: [esp-header] CSS place-content value for the brand container. Defaults to center.

properties.name: --esp-header-button-closed-color
properties.description: [esp-header] Burger button color when menu is closed. Defaults to var(--esp-color-headings).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-closed-hover-color
properties.description: [esp-header] Burger button hover color when menu is closed. Defaults to var(--esp-color-headings-hover).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-open-color
properties.description: [esp-header] Burger button color when menu is open. Defaults to var(--esp-color-text).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-open-hover-color
properties.description: [esp-header] Burger button hover color when menu is open. Defaults to var(--esp-color-headings-hover).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-stroke-width
properties.description: [esp-header] Stroke width of the burger button lines. Defaults to 0.45rem.

properties.name: --esp-header-button-background
properties.description: [esp-header-button] Background color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-3).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-background-hover
properties.description: [esp-header-button] Hover background color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-4).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-box-shadow
properties.description: [esp-header-button] Box shadow. Defaults to 0px 0px 3px 0px var(--esp-color-shadow).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-border-left
properties.description: [esp-header-button] Left border. Defaults to 1px dotted var(--esp-color-border).

properties.name: --esp-header-button-color
properties.description: [esp-header-button] Text and icon color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-text).

properties.name: --esp-menu-background
properties.description: [esp-menu] Background color of vertical and drawer menus. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-1).

properties.name: --esp-menu-border-color
properties.description: [esp-menu] Border color of menu rails and drawers. Defaults to var(--esp-color-border).

properties.name: --esp-menu-scrim-color
properties.description: [esp-menu] Scrim color when the drawer is open.

properties.name: --esp-menu-drawer-shadow
properties.description: [esp-menu] Box shadow for the drawer overlay. Defaults to 2px 0 8px var(--esp-color-shadow).

properties.name: --esp-menu-drawer-width
properties.description: [esp-menu] Drawer width. Defaults to min(22rem, 86vw).

properties.name: --esp-menu-top-offset
properties.description: [esp-menu] Top offset for drawers below fixed headers. Defaults to 0px.

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Text color of the group header. Defaults to var(--esp-color-headings).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Background color of the group header. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-1).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-hover-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Hover background color of the group header. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-2).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-indicator-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Color of the expand/collapse indicator. Defaults to var(--esp-color-headings).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-border-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Border color of the group. Defaults to var(--esp-color-border).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-panel-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Background color of horizontal disclosure panels. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-1).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-panel-shadow
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Box shadow of horizontal disclosure panels. Defaults to 0 4px 12px var(--esp-color-shadow).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-min-width
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Minimum width of the icon rail. Defaults to calc(1 * var(--esp-size-font)).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-padding
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Padding inside the icon rail. Defaults to var(--esp-size-padding).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Background color of the icon rail. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-2).

properties.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-size
properties.description: [esp-menu-group] Size of generated and slotted group icons. Defaults to calc(1 * var(--esp-size-font)).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Text color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-text).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Background color.

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-border-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Border color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-border).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-hover-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Hover text color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-headings-hover).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-hover-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Hover background color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-2).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Icon area background color. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-2).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-active-color
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Text color of the active item. Defaults to var(--esp-color-link).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-active-background
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Background color of the active item. Defaults to var(--esp-color-layer-2).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-padding
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Padding around the item label. Defaults to var(--esp-size-small) var(--esp-size-padding).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-min-width
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Minimum width of the icon rail. Defaults to calc(1 * var(--esp-size-font)).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-padding
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Padding inside the icon rail. Defaults to var(--esp-size-padding).

properties.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-size
properties.description: [esp-menu-item] Size of generated and slotted item icons. Defaults to calc(1 * var(--esp-size-font)).

properties.name: --esp-color-burger
properties.description: [esp-burger] Line color when closed.

properties.name: --esp-color-burger-hover
properties.description: [esp-burger] Hover line color when closed.

properties.name: --esp-color-burger-opened
properties.description: [esp-burger] Line color when open.

properties.name: --esp-color-burger-opened-hover
properties.description: [esp-burger] Hover line color when open.

properties.name: --esp-size-burger-stroke
properties.description: [esp-burger] Stroke width of the burger lines.

properties.name: --esp-tab-color-border
properties.description: [esp-tab-group] Border color of the tab group container.

properties.name: --esp-tab-color-background
properties.description: [esp-tab-group] Background color of the tab group.

properties.name: --esp-tab-color-strip-background
properties.description: [esp-tab-group] Background color of the active tab indicator strip.

properties.name: --esp-tab-color-button-hover
properties.description: [esp-tab-group] Tab button hover color.

properties.name: --esp-tab-color-button-active
properties.description: [esp-tab-group] Active tab button color.

properties.name: --esp-tab-color-text
properties.description: [esp-tab-group] Text color for tab buttons.

properties.name: --esp-tab-size-padding
properties.description: [esp-tab-group, esp-tab] Padding inside tab panels.

properties.name: --esp-checkbox-size
properties.description: [esp-checkbox] Width and height of the checkbox.

properties.name: --esp-checkbox-icon-color
properties.description: [esp-checkbox] Stroke color of the checkmark icon.

properties.name: --esp-checkbox-focus-shadow
properties.description: [esp-checkbox] Color of the focus ring shadow.

properties.name: --esp-radio-button-size
properties.description: [esp-radio-button] Width and height of the radio button.

properties.name: --esp-radio-button-icon-color
properties.description: [esp-radio-button] Stroke color of the radio indicator.

properties.name: --esp-radio-button-focus-shadow
properties.description: [esp-radio-button] Color of the focus ring shadow.

properties.name: --esp-switch-width
properties.description: [esp-switch] Width of the switch track.

properties.name: --esp-switch-height
properties.description: [esp-switch] Height of the switch track.

properties.name: --esp-switch-thumb-size
properties.description: [esp-switch] Diameter of the thumb.

properties.name: --esp-switch-track-color
properties.description: [esp-switch] Track background color when off.

properties.name: --esp-switch-track-color-on
properties.description: [esp-switch] Track background color when on.

properties.name: --esp-switch-thumb-color
properties.description: [esp-switch] Thumb color.

properties.name: --esp-switch-focus-shadow
properties.description: [esp-switch] Color of the focus ring shadow.

properties.name: --esp-toaster-z-index
properties.description: [esp-toaster] Stack order of the toaster container.

properties.name: --esp-toaster-gap
properties.description: [esp-toaster] Gap between stacked toasts.

properties.name: --esp-toaster-padding
properties.description: [esp-toaster] Padding around the toaster container.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-background
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Background color of the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-border
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Border of the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-border-radius
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Border radius of the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-color
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Text color inside the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-font-size
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Font size of tooltip text.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-max-width
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Maximum width of the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-padding
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Padding inside the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-tooltip-shadow
properties.description: [esp-tooltip] Box shadow for the tooltip.

properties.name: --esp-progress-border-radius
properties.description: [esp-progress] Border radius of the track and fill.

properties.name: --esp-progress-circle-size
properties.description: [esp-progress] Diameter of the circular progress ring in circle mode.

properties.name: --esp-progress-fill-color
properties.description: [esp-progress] Color of the progress fill.

properties.name: --esp-progress-font-size
properties.description: [esp-progress] Font size for the value text.

properties.name: --esp-progress-height
properties.description: [esp-progress] Height of the progress bar track.

properties.name: --esp-progress-border-color
properties.description: [esp-progress] Border color of the track outline.

properties.name: --esp-color-dialog-bg
properties.description: [esp-dialog] Background color of the dialog overlay.

properties.name: --esp-dialog-bg-opacity
properties.description: [esp-dialog] Opacity of the dialog overlay background.

properties.name: --esp-form-item-label-color
properties.description: [esp-form-item] Color of the label text.

properties.name: --esp-form-item-error-color
properties.description: [esp-form-item] Color of the error message text.

properties.name: --esp-form-item-font
properties.description: [esp-form-item] Font family for the form item.

properties.name: --esp-form-item-font-size
properties.description: [esp-form-item] Font size for the form item.

properties.name: --esp-details-color-border
properties.description: [esp-details] Border color.

properties.name: --esp-details-color-background
properties.description: [esp-details] Background color.

properties.name: --esp-details-color-summary-background
properties.description: [esp-details] Summary section background.

properties.name: --esp-details-color-summary-hover-background
properties.description: [esp-details] Summary section hover background.

properties.name: --esp-details-color-summary-background-active
properties.description: [esp-details] Summary section background when open.

properties.name: --esp-details-color-indicator
properties.description: [esp-details] Color of the expand / collapse indicator.

properties.name: --esp-details-size-padding
properties.description: [esp-details] Padding inside the details panel.

properties.name: --esp-details-group-color-border
properties.description: [esp-details-group] Border color for the group container.

properties.name: --esp-info-color-border
properties.description: [esp-info] Border color.

properties.name: --esp-info-color-background
properties.description: [esp-info] Background color.

properties.name: --esp-info-color-text
properties.description: [esp-info] Text color.

properties.name: --esp-breadcrumb-separator-color
properties.description: [esp-breadcrumbs] Color of the separator between breadcrumbs.

properties.name: --esp-breadcrumb-color
properties.description: [esp-breadcrumb] Link text color.

properties.name: --esp-breadcrumb-hover-color
properties.description: [esp-breadcrumb] Link hover text color.

properties.name: --esp-image-border
properties.description: [esp-image] Border property of the image.

properties.name: --esp-image-upload-preview-background
properties.description: [esp-image-upload] Background color of the image preview area.

properties.name: --esp-image-preview-border-color
properties.description: [esp-image-preview] Border color of the preview.

properties.name: --esp-image-preview-remove-color
properties.description: [esp-image-preview] Text color of the remove button.

properties.name: --esp-color-picker-bg
properties.description: [esp-picker-menu] Background color of picker menu items.

properties.name: --esp-color-picker-bg-alt
properties.description: [esp-picker-menu] Alternate background color for picker menu items.

properties.name: --esp-size-color-picker-border-width
properties.description: [esp-color-picker] Border width of the color picker.

properties.name: --esp-grid-border
properties.description: [esp-grid] Border style of the grid.
